title: Pearl Construction Group Pty Ltd — Public safety
investigation_objective: Pearl Construction Group Pty Ltd pleaded guilty to failing to ensure a workplace under its management and control was safe and without risks to health, and was fined $150,000 in the Melbourne County Court, following the death of a 23-year-old worker who fell approximately three metres through an unprotected stair void while carrying steel at a multi-storey townhouse site in Glen Waverley in September 2022. A subcontractor sole trader involved in the same incident was separately sentenced to a community corrections order plus a $10,000 fine.
scope: Pleaded guilty to failing to ensure a safe workplace following a worker's fatal fall; Fined $150,000 by the Melbourne County Court; Incident involved an unprotected stair void with no fall-prevention measures in place
